ddls:
CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "hex_code" TEXT /* Hexadecimal code for the error */,
  "dec_code" INTEGER /* Decimal code for the error */,
  "minor_code" INTEGER /* Minor code for the error (if applicable) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Brief name of the error */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the error */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error category */,
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error subcategory */,
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error severity level */,
  "case_study" TEXT /* Detailed case study of the error */,
  "resolution_steps" TEXT /* Steps to resolve the error */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was first recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES error_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_subcategory_id FOREIGN KEY ("subcategory_id") REFERENCES error_subcategories ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_severity_id FOREIGN KEY ("severity_id") REFERENCES error_severity_levels ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the error category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_subcategories" (
  "subcategory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error subcategory */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error category the subcategory belongs to */,
  "subcategory_name" TEXT /* Name of the error subcategory */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the error subcategory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subcategory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subcategory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_subcategories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES error_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_severity_levels" (
  "severity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "severity_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the severity level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the severity level was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("severity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_occurrences" (
  "occurrence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error occurrence */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error that occurred */,
  "occurrence_date" TEXT /* Date when the error occurred */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the error was resolved */,
  "resolved_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the error */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was resolved */,
  "resolution_comment" TEXT /* Comment on the resolution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occurrence was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the occurrence was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occurrence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_occurrences_resolved_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_occurrences_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer, QA) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the error */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the error was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, update) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the error data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_waivers" (
  "waiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each waiver */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error being waived */,
  "waiver_reason" TEXT /* Reason for waiving the error */,
  "waiver_date" TEXT /* Date when the waiver was approved */,
  "waived_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the waiver */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the waiver was approved */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the waiver was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_waivers_waived_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("waived_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_waivers_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user adding the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was added */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_comments_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "error_id" INTEGER /* ID of the error being versioned */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_versions_error_id FOREIGN KEY ("error_id") REFERENCES errors ("error_id")
)
